# daytona_organization_usage (Data Source)

Reads quota and current usage for a Daytona organization.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "daytona_organization_usage" "example" {
  organization_id = "organization-id"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `organization_id` (String) Daytona organization ID to read.

### Read-Only

- `current_snapshot_usage` (Number) Current snapshot usage.
- `current_volume_usage` (Number) Current volume usage.
- `id` (String) Data source identifier.
- `region_usage` (Attributes List) Usage and quota broken down by region and sandbox class. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--region_usage))
- `total_snapshot_quota` (Number) Total snapshot quota.
- `total_volume_quota` (Number) Total volume quota.

<a id="nestedatt--region_usage"></a>
### Nested Schema for `region_usage`

Read-Only:

- `allowed_gpu_types` (List of String) Allowed GPU types.
- `current_cpu_usage` (Number) Current CPU usage.
- `current_disk_usage` (Number) Current disk usage.
- `current_gpu_usage` (Number) Current GPU usage.
- `current_memory_usage` (Number) Current memory usage.
- `max_cpu_per_gpu_sandbox` (Number) Maximum CPU per GPU sandbox.
- `max_cpu_per_sandbox` (Number) Maximum CPU per sandbox.
- `max_disk_per_gpu_sandbox` (Number) Maximum disk per GPU sandbox.
- `max_disk_per_non_ephemeral_sandbox` (Number) Maximum disk per non-ephemeral sandbox.
- `max_disk_per_sandbox` (Number) Maximum disk per sandbox.
- `max_memory_per_gpu_sandbox` (Number) Maximum memory per GPU sandbox.
- `max_memory_per_sandbox` (Number) Maximum memory per sandbox.
- `region_id` (String) Region ID.
- `sandbox_class` (String) Sandbox class.
- `total_cpu_quota` (Number) Total CPU quota.
- `total_disk_quota` (Number) Total disk quota.
- `total_gpu_quota` (Number) Total GPU quota.
- `total_memory_quota` (Number) Total memory quota.
